页=1 bbox=(31,33,196,14) Two-Column Layout Example
页=1 bbox=(31,72,237,37) Column 1 content. Machine learning models process 9164 documents per hour with 95% accuracy. The throughput depends on document complexity and hardware.
页=1 bbox=(300,72,237,37) Column 2 content. Machine learning models process 9509 documents per hour with 91% accuracy. The throughput depends on document complexity and hardware.
